// description: Maps each logical Android signing key (the GitHub-secret prefix ANDROID_KEYSTORE_<name>_BASE64 / _PASSWORD / optional _ALIAS) to the .user app folder + store it materializes into. Initialize-CiAndroidSigning.ps1 writes flat files there: android_keystore_<store>.p12, android_keystore_<store>_password.txt (+ optional android_keystore_<store>_alias.txt). Each store is its own secret even when two stores share one physical key (e.g. Connect google/web). The alias is NOT required here — it is auto-detected from the keystore (or supplied via the optional _ALIAS secret / publish.json) at build time.
